seoTitle: Kentlyn vs Kentucky South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kentlyn vs Kentucky South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kentlyn and Kentucky South.
heading: Kentlyn vs Kentucky South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kentlyn, New South Wales and Kentucky South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kentucky South has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kentlyn (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kentlyn or Kentucky South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kentlyn has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Kentucky South scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kentlyn scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Kentucky South scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kentlyn or Kentucky South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kentucky South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
